name: Music Broadcast Limited
summary: Music Broadcast Limited owns and operates FM radio stations under the Radio City brand name. Its radio stations deliver film, non-film, devotional, regional, and international music. The company operates 28 radio stations in 39 cities in India. It also operates radio stations that offer entertainment news, movie reviews, and photo galleries. In addition, the company operates online platform radiocity.in, which has 18 radio stations in 9 languages; and √Ç¬ëRadio City' youtube channels. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Mumbai, India. Music Broadcast Limited is a subsidiary of Jagran Prakashan Limited.
